styleGuide.outputGoal: portfolio cover art that reads cleanly at card size
globalConstraints: No logos, no brand trademarks, no text overlays, no watermarks.
No faces or named real people.
Use clean composition with one clear focal area near center-left.
Keep palette rich but controlled; avoid muddy low-contrast scenes.
Render quality should feel editorial and contemporary.

projects.prompt: Editorial product illustration of a spatial music workspace on an infinite canvas: layered cards, waveform strips, thread-like connectors, and subtle neon cyan markers over deep graphite surfaces. Abstract UI-inspired composition, depth, and light bloom. Clean, premium, modern, no readable text.

Atmospheric genealogy research scene built from archival paper textures, photo fragments, map pins, and branching node lines that form a family-tree silhouette. Forest green and warm parchment palette, respectful and grounded mood, high detail, cinematic soft light, no text.

Hopeful behavior-change mobile wellness visual: phone-like central frame, pulse rings, progress arcs, and calm gradient horizon from deep teal to sunrise amber. Minimal, focused, reassuring, product-forward composition, premium app campaign style, no text.

Minimal native iOS productivity concept showing one highlighted card in crisp focus while several soft translucent cards recede into background layers. Plum and graphite palette, tactile glass-like depth, quiet and intentional composition, no text.

Data-driven grocery intelligence concept: floating receipt strips, item tokens, and price trend ribbons arranged in a warm amber and charcoal visual system. Clean fintech-meets-consumer composition, high clarity, modern product art direction, no logos or text.

Fashion portfolio moodboard style still life with dramatic fabric folds, editorial lighting, and gallery-like framing. Elevated plum and neutral palette, expressive but restrained, high-end visual direction, no faces, no text.

Installation art gallery atmosphere with sculptural forms, large negative space, and directional light shafts across concrete-like surfaces. Monochrome slate palette with subtle warm accents, refined and calm, no text or signage.

Craft bakery product scene with artisanal pastries arranged in a modern still-life composition, warm morning light, textured surfaces, and natural tones. Friendly but premium brand aesthetic, no labels, no readable text.

Abstract WebGL-inspired artwork: layered fluid color fields, light-reactive gradients, and painterly digital interference patterns with deep teal and electric highlights. Experimental, immersive, high detail, no text.

Elegant writing and publishing product atmosphere: stacked paper-like panels, media thumbnails as abstract blocks, and archive folders receding into depth. Slate and soft silver palette, polished enterprise-product mood, no logos, no text.
